rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '410 8 6' as clear in the respective columns. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds as 4 and noted ambiguity, which was not present for the correct reading.
Consensus between extractors. Clearly a header with no associated monetary values.

Visual verification for description 'Long Wittenham School' (from gemini-flash, overriding gpt-5-mini's 'Lang'). Amount '5 5' (5s 5d) is clearly visible in the shillings and pence columns, as correctly identified by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly stated no amounts were visible.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms both description 'Belsham Do' and amounts '5 5 2' (£5 5s 2d) in the correct columns. gpt-5-mini misread the description and incorrectly aligned the amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Gwiner Do' and amounts '5 2' (£5 2s 0d) in the pounds and shillings columns respectively. gpt-5-mini misaligned the amounts to shillings/pence.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '10' is clearly aligned with the pounds column. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed it in shillings.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'South Livinge Dio of Oxford' and amounts '5 5' (£5 5s 0d) in the pounds and shillings columns. gpt-5-mini misread the description and misaligned amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Widows & Orphans of Clergy D-' and amounts '5 5' (£5 5s 0d) in the pounds and shillings columns. gpt-5-mini misread the description and misaligned amounts.

Description from gemini-flash (closer to image). Amount £0 12s 0d is consensus and visually confirmed in shillings column.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Corn Prices' and amounts '1 9 6' (£1 9s 6d) in the pounds, shillings, and pence columns. gpt-5-mini incorrectly shifted the pounds value into shillings.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms '1 1' (£1 1s 0d) are in the pounds and shillings columns. gpt-5-mini incorrectly shifted the amounts to shillings and pence.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description and amounts '9 4' (£9 4s 0d) in the pounds and shillings columns. gpt-5-mini misread the amounts and parts of the description.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description and amounts '7 16' (£7 16s 0d) in the pounds and shillings columns. gpt-5-mini misread the description and pounds amount, also noting faintness which is not visually apparent for '7'.
Description from gemini-flash ('Midsr' for Midsummer confirmed visually). Amount £12 0s 9d is consensus and visually confirmed.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description and amounts '7 15 3' (£7 15s 3d). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the pence as '8'.
Consensus between extractors. Clearly a header with no associated monetary values.
Description from gemini-flash (visually confirmed). Amount £40 0s 0d is consensus and visually confirmed in pounds column.
Description from gemini-flash (visually confirmed). Amount £40 0s 0d is consensus and visually confirmed in pounds column.
Description from gemini-flash (visually confirmed). Amount £40 0s 0d is consensus and visually confirmed in pounds column.
Description from gemini-flash (visually confirmed). Amount £0 12s 0d is consensus and visually confirmed in shillings column.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description and amounts '816 9 3' (£816 9s 3d). gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the pounds as '616'.

rows.description: For Welsh's bill for the yr ending Nov 2, 1843
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description and amounts '64 6' (£64 6s 0d) with pence column empty. gpt-5-mini incorrectly added '6' to pence.
Description 'Stringer' from gemini-flash, confirmed visually (the 'r' is present, albeit with a flourish). Amount £0 12s 9d is consensus and visually confirmed.

rows.description: Chapel Mason's work on Campfield Farm
rows.notes: Description combined from both: 'Chapel' (from gemini-flash) and 'Campfield Farm' (from gpt-5-mini), both visually confirmed. Amount £2 15s 0d is consensus and visually confirmed.

rows.description: Gresham Rector's prize for Mr. Greene
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Gresham Rector's prize for Mr. Greene' and amounts '9 8 6' (£9 8s 6d). gpt-5-mini misread the shillings as '18' and unnecessarily abbreviated the name.

Selected gemini-flash's description and absence of amount, confirmed visually. This row acts as a header/summary for the subsequent indented items. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the total amount from a later row ('Repairs of Bushey Tenements') to this row and misread the description.
Row found only by gemini-flash and visually confirmed. The monetary amount is explicitly written within the description text, including a clear ½ pence fraction.
Row found only by gemini-flash and visually confirmed. The monetary amount (4s 0d) is explicitly written within the description text.
Row found only by gemini-flash and visually confirmed. The monetary amount (8s 9d) is explicitly written within the description text.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description and amounts '8 3 9 ½' (£8 3s 9½d), including the fraction. gpt-5-mini significantly misread the amounts and expressed low confidence.
Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description and amount '5' (£5 0s 0d) in the pounds column. gpt-5-mini misread the amount as '1' and noted uncertainty.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Dale valuing, Kidlington Rectory Farm &c' and amount '1' (£1 0s 0d) in the pounds column. gpt-5-mini misread the description and amount.

rows.description: For Woollcombe money advanced by him for
rows.notes: Visual verification shows this is the first line of a two-line description, with no amount associated with it directly. Both extractors incorrectly assigned an amount to this row. Description adapted from gemini-flash.

rows.description: the redemption of the Sole plate seized by King's
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'the redemption of the Sole plate seized by King's' and amounts '19 7' (£19 7s 0d). gpt-5-mini significantly misread the description and amounts.
Row found only by gemini-flash and visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini did not extract this row and appears to have incorrectly attributed its amount to a previous row.
Description from gemini-flash (visually confirmed). Amount £6 8s 0d is consensus and visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini misread description.

rows.description: Mrs. Rose kitchen woman, allowance at 5/- pr week from March 6 1843 to Xmas 1843 42 weeks
rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash (visually confirmed, including 'Xmas' symbol and 'pr'). Amount £10 10s 0d is consensus and visually confirmed. gpt-5-mini misread parts of the description.

Visual verification confirms the amount '145 15 0 ½' (£145 15s 0½d). The description line itself is blank, although it is implicitly a 'TOTAL'. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the blank description but misread shillings as '16'. gemini-flash correctly identified amounts but added a 'TOTAL' description not explicitly present on this specific line.
